2605.24588.title: HeartBeatAI: An Interpretable and Robust Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Label ECG Arrhythmia Detection
2605.24588.paper_summary: While Deep Learning (DL) enhances automated electrocardiogram (ECG) analysis, clinical deployment is hindered by class imbalance and the generalization gap. This paper presents HeartBeatAI, a deep learning framework combining domain generalization, multi-scale feature aggregation, and clinical explainability for robust 12-lead ECG classification. Moving beyond image-based paradigms, HeartBeatAI integrates a Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) ResNet to isolate diagnostic leads alongside a Multi-Layer Concentration Pipeline to capture macro-rhythm and micro-morphological anomalies. To mitigate domain shift, the framework employs MixStyle regularization and Label Smoothing. Rigorous benchmarking across four large-scale datasets using intra-source and Leave-One-Domain-Out (LODO) protocols demonstrates high performance (98% Macro F1-score) under intra-source conditions. However, LODO evaluations reveal significant degradation in detecting rare anomalies, highlighting a persistent challenge in cross-institutional deployment.
2605.24588.paper_summary_zh: 雖然深度學習（DL）增強了自動心電圖（ECG）分析，但臨床部署受到類別不平衡和泛化差距的阻礙。本文提出了HeartBeatAI，一個結合領域泛化、多尺度特徵聚合和臨床可解釋性的深度學習框架，用於穩健的12導程ECG分類。HeartBeatAI超越了基於圖像的範式，整合了Squeeze-and-Excitation（SE）ResNet以孤立診斷導程，並搭配多層集中管道以捕捉宏觀節律和微觀形態異常。為了減輕領域轉移，該框架採用了MixStyle正則化和標籤平滑。在四個大型數據集上進行的嚴格基準測試，使用源內和留一領域外（LODO）協議，在源內條件下顯示出高性能（98%宏觀F1分數）。然而，LODO評估顯示在檢測稀有異常方面存在顯著退化，突顯了跨機構部署中的持續挑戰。
2605.24588.author: Shubham Gupta et.al.
2605.24588.authors: Shubham Gupta, Nikhil Panwar, Partha Pratim Roy
